arts.ttl: Real Madrid dressing room feel Kylian Mbappe has not been angry enough since arriving
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to go into a major Champions League clash with Liverpool at Anfield, aware that if they lose, it could mean farewell to their hopes of finishing in the top eight. With the stakes higher, and Vinicius Junior out injured, the hope is that it will spark Kylian Mbappe into life. arts.ttl: Can Liverpool end their Real Madrid hoodoo tonight?
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Real Madrid to Anfield this evening in the pick of Wednesday night’s Champions League ties. The teams have 21 trophies in this competition combined and have met in three finals previously, including in 2018 and 2022. arts.ttl: “Massive hero of mine” – Jude Bellingham lauds Liverpool legend and hints at talks with Reds last summer
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham has found himself a footballing home at Real Madrid, but ahead of a clash against Liverpool, he’s hinted at talks with the Reds last summer.
